channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Checks and Balance newsletter: Of God and MAGA
item.description: Charlotte Howard, our executive editor and New York bureau chief, unpacks the blurring of church and state among Donald Trump’s circle

item.title: South Korea’s Renewed Strategic Pivot to India
item.description: For the past decade, India-South Korea interactions have been limited. President Lee’s upcoming visit is set to change that.

item.title: The Deepening Deterioration of Public Sentiment Between Japan and China
item.description: What do Japanese and Chinese think about each other’s countries? Let’s look at the numbers.

item.title: BRICS: Can India Lead a Bloc Without a Cause?
item.description: BRICS appears to be more riddled with internal conflicts than most multilateral groups.
